name: Andover 13th Street Sports Park
description: Andover 13th Street Sports Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Andover, KS. There are 5 hard courts. 2 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Andover Community Center
description: Andover Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Andover, KS. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Andover YMCA Farha Sports Complex
description: Andover YMCA Farha Sports Complex is a place to play pickleball in Andover, KS. There are 5 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to lights.

name: Augusta United Methodist Church
description: Augusta United Methodist Church is a place to play pickleball in Augusta, KS. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Dr. Jim Farha Andover YMCA
description: Dr. Jim Farha Andover YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Andover, KS. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: El Dorado Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at El Dorado Recreation Center in El Dorado, KS! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: Sam Binter Tennis Complex
description: El Dorado high school and middle school use these courts during the fall and spring for tennis practice from 3-6 pm. They also host meets with other schools periodically during the seasons.

name: Terradyne Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Terradyne Country Club in Andover, KS! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.
